snippet.title: Eurovision Song Contest 2021 - Grand Final - Live Stream
snippet.description:
The Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 will take place on 22 May. 26 Acts will perform in the final of which 6 countries are already pre-qualified. This are host country The Netherlands and the so called 'Big 5' consisting of France, Germany, Italy, Spain and the United Kingdom. Ten acts will qualify from the first-Semi-Final and the remaining ten acts will qualify from the Second Semi-Final. 

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/

snippet.title: Popov - NA TIńÜU ūü§ę (Official Video) Prod. by Popov
snippet.description:
Contact: zedgeneracija@gmail.com

Music: Popov
Text: Popov, Nucci
Arrangement: Popov
Mix & Master: Popov
Back vocal: Andrea Aleksic

Video: Tsunami production 
Written & creative dir by: Popov
Shot & edited by: Marko Panic

Popov: https://www.instagram.com/jelovopopov
Nucci: https://www.instagram.com/nucciovde
Marko Panic: https://www.instagram.com/markopaanic
Tsunami: https://www.instagram.com/tsunamivids

TEKST:
Strofa 1:
guzu lupim joj, ko da je komad moj
nek ne brine se tvoj sto sad oblio te znoj
cikago il Detroit u avionu Moet
pa smota mi taj dzoint i pogledom me opije
 
ona samo gori, pun klub je
ostavi se njega, vidis glup je
posle zurke vodim te u kupe
rekla je da hoce sve na kub je

dobra, njna koza meni uvek tako dobra
na ziku moju uvija ko kobra 
i kaze hoce sve, hoce odma
da proba me

Bridz:
nemoj da pricas
nemoj, nema da pricas, nikom
nemoj da pricas
nemoj, nema da pricas ne

Moze bebi al samo na 

Ref:
ticu ticu ticu samo na

ticu ticu ticu samo na 
ticu ticu ticu samo na 
ticu samo na ticu

Strofa 2:
ispomerana lezi tu u mome krevetu
skine sve sa sebe tu je vec noc devetu
i nema sanse da skines parfem
miris jak je, znace da ga lazes

volim kad me zove papi je
volim kad se vodke napije
volim kad me zove tatice
volim kad se vide gacice

ma neka traje 
ma neka traje 
ma nek se daje e e
(tatice)
tags: sve moze bebi al samo na ticu

snippet.description:

Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

snippet.title: Na VlaŇ°ińáu snijeg zameo ovńćarska stada
snippet.description:
Od sinońá pada snijeg na planini VlaŇ°ińá. Jutros smo posjetili lokalitet Galice,
i Deveńćana a najteŇĺa situacija za stońćare je na Releju, Ň†antińáu, Kraljici. Mnoga stada su ostala bez hrane. Na Galici smo razgovarali sa Vahidom Rubanovińáem, sinom od  Brice koji je nastavio ońćev zanat. KaŇĺe da se on s ovcama spustio na Galicu jer na tom dijelu VlaŇ°ińáa ne pada puno snijega a ovce mogu pronańái i neku travku. Kako je jutros izgledalo na VlaŇ°ińáu pogledajte u ovoj video prińći.
PridruŇĺite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: Yemin 339. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | The Promise Season 3 Episode 339 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

snippet.title: Ruski specijalci stigli u Srbiju ‚ÄĒ pońćele antiteroristińćke vojne veŇĺbe ‚ÄěZajednińćki odgovor 2021‚Äú
snippet.description:
U Srbiji su pońćele antiteroristińćke vojne veŇĺbe ruske i srpske vojske ‚ÄěZajednińćki odgovor 2021‚Äú, koje ńáe trajati do 25. maja. U njima uńćestvuju jedinice za specijalne operacije Srbije i Rusije.

U vojnim veŇĺbama uńćestvuje 200 ruskih vojnika i 11 jedinica vojne tehnike Zapadnog vojnog okruga.

Na vojnim manevrima se veŇĺba desant, uz pomońá padobranskih sistema ‚ÄěArbalet‚Äú, napredovanje ka objektu nezakonitih vojnih formacija, njegovo blokiranje i uniŇ°tenje. Pored toga, izvodińáe se gańĎanja iz malokalibarskog oruŇĺja.

Na ceremoniji otvaranja, strane su istakle znańćaj zajednińćkih aktivnosti borbene obuke za razvoj saradnje oruŇĺanih snaga Srbije i Rusije na polju borbe protiv terorizma.

Za sve najvaŇĺnije vesti, komentare i analize posetite naŇ° sajt ‚Ėļ https://rs.sputniknews.com/

U moru informacija treba izabrati pravu.

snippet.title: Backyard Squirrel Maze 2.0- The Walnut Heist
snippet.description:
I bit off more than I could chew.  Join me this summer in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

NEW Phat Gus Merch here!! https://markrober.store/

More info about my Creative Engineering Course- 

This class is a hands-on, 30-day learning experience that will teach you how to use engineering and science to bring your creative ideas to life.

During this class, I'm going to share with you my entire creative engineering process from start to finish. You're going to follow along with me as I fully design and engineer 3 brand new builds from scratch... from how I come up with the idea, all the way through bringing the final builds to life.

The best part is, over the month, you'll follow along with me and my process, side by side, and you will leave the class with 3 original, creative builds of your own.

This is the class I wish I had when I was starting out. It's designed to take your skills to make cool stuff to the next level, whether you're a beginner or a more experienced maker/engineer.

The class officially starts on June 7th so claim your spot if you're interested!

See you in class!

-Mark

snippet.title: Dosije - Misterija sivog Citroena | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Misterija sivog Citroena | PRVA
Sve epizode moŇĺete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Na samo 200 metara od svoje kuńáe u selu Mramor nadomak NiŇ°a brutalno je likvidiran vlasnik mesare Dakom, ugledni biznismen i porodińćan ńćovek. U tom trenutku meŇ°tani su ostali u Ň°oku, nikom nije bilo jasno kome je smetao ńćovek koji je imao sopstveni biznis i poŇ°teno Ňĺiveo od njega. Da tragedija bude veńáa njegovo telo pronaŇ°ao je mlańĎi sin, dozivao je oca ali bezuspeŇ°no.

Policija se istog trenutka dala u potragu za pońćiniocem. Njihova istraga bila je mukotrpna i temeljna, bilo je momenata kada su nailazili na ńáorsokak i bezizlazne situacije ali ipak ubice su bile i bliŇĺe nego Ň°to su mogli da zamisle.

Posetite naŇ° sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

#Dosije #MasanLekic #PRVA

snippet.title: Motika je moja teretana
snippet.description:
Valentina Duvnjak iz Donjeg Malovana na Kupresu, vratila se u rodno selo iz Banjaluke. Neobińćna je po tome Ň°to je svoju poruŇ°enu kuńáu sama obnovila jer donacije nije mogla dobiti. Zidala je, Ňĺbukala, obnavljala krovnu konstrukciju. NajteŇĺe joj je bilo zidati dimnjak ali i to je uspjela. BivŇ°oj novinarki jedino nedostaje redakcija a sve drugo ima. Zatekli smo je kako s majkom sadi krumpire. KaŇĺe njezina motika je njezina teretana. Proizvodi eko hranu i dobroga je zdravlja. U svome vrtu ima sve vrste povrńáa. Puno bolje se osjeńáa na selu gdje provodi Ňĺivot bez stresa u miru, tiŇ°ini, ljepoti krajolika. Jedne zime ńćak je viŇ°e od dvadeset dana bila zametena snijegom a druŇ°tvo su joj bili najńćeŇ°ńáe medvjedi koji su prolazili pored kuńáe kao da su domicilni. Pogledajte neobińćnu prińću sa Kupresa u kojoj je glavna junakinja djevojka, bivŇ°a novinarka.


PridruŇĺite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: Painting on CLAY
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I wanted to try something a little bit different. I decided to try sculpting with Das air dry clay. I wanted to make some original clay creations and paint them myself. I feel like it's so satisfying to watch sculpting and then painting on clay. I've seen those tiktok clay painting videos hahah. So this has been on my video idea list for a long time. I am very much so a beginner when it comes to clay, so I wanted to stick to some fun and easy things to make with air dry clay. I think air dry clay is much more beginner friendly than polymer clay, and I really enjoyed working with this brand. Although, of course, the most fun part of creating things with clay, is painting and decorating the clay in the end. I ended up making some cute, custom clay figurines, I hope you like them!


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV

snippet.title: Watch the moment an Israeli air strike hits the Associated Press and Al-Jazeera offices in Gaza
snippet.description:
Israeli air strikes destroyed a¬†Gaza high-rise housing international media offices on Saturday, in an attack The Associated Press described as¬†the latest step by the military to silence reporting from the territory.

The strike on Jala Tower came as¬†the militant group Hamas intensified rocket fire from the besieged enclave towards Tel Aviv¬†after a night in which Israeli air strikes killed¬†at least 10 members of one family in a Gaza refugee camp, the deadliest strike since hostilities erupted earlier this week.

snippet.description:
KuruluŇü Osman 59. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti:
UMUR BEY‚ÄôńįN OBASINA MOńěOL BASKINI
Osman Bey‚Äôin uyarńĪlarńĪna kulak asmadan MońüollarńĪn kampńĪnńĪ basmaya giden Umur Bey ve alpleri, Nikola tarafńĪndan uyarńĪlan Togay tarafńĪndan tuzańüa d√ľŇü√ľr√ľl√ľr. Togay‚ÄôńĪn komutanńĪ Camuha da n√∂kerleri ile birlikte savunmasńĪz kalmńĪŇü Umur Bey obasńĪna baskńĪn d√ľzenler. Malhun Hatun ve bir avu√ß alp obayńĪ savunmak i√ßin √∂l√ľm kalńĪm m√ľcadelesine girer.  

NńįKOLA FIRSATTAN ńįSTńįFADE EDńįYOR
Osman Bey ve Togay arasńĪndaki anlaŇümayńĪ bozmayńĪ baŇüaran Nikola, d√ľŇümanlarńĪnńĪn birbirini kńĪrmasńĪndan faydalanmak isterken; Togay‚ÄôńĪn anlaŇümayńĪ bozduńüunu d√ľŇü√ľnen Osman Bey, KayńĪ ObasńĪ‚Äôna saldńĪrńĪ ihtimaline karŇüńĪlńĪk √∂nlem alńĪr. 

OSMAN BEY HESAP SORUYOR
Nikola tarafńĪndan yalnńĪz bńĪrakńĪlan ve tuzańüa d√ľŇüen Umur Bey, yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ baŇüarńĪsńĪzlńĪńüńĪn ardńĪndan b√ľy√ľk piŇümanlńĪk yaŇüar. Umur Bey obasńĪnńĪn yaralarńĪnńĪ sarmak i√ßin derhal harekete ge√ßen Osman Bey, Umur Bey‚Äôden ise T√ľrkmenlerin istikbalini tehlikeye atmasńĪnńĪn hesabńĪnńĪ soracaktńĪr.

MALHUN HATUN MOńěOL SALDIRISINA NASIL KARŇěI KOYACAK?
Osman Bey, t√ľm uyarńĪlarńĪna rańümen baŇüńĪna buyruk hareket eden Umur Bey‚Äôde nasńĪl hesap soracak? Umur Bey‚Äôi tuzańüa d√ľŇü√ľren Togay, Osman Bey‚Äôe karŇüńĪ nasńĪl bir hamle yapacak? Malhun Hatun obasńĪnńĪ Mońüollara karŇüńĪ nasńĪl savunacak? Osman Bey, Togay‚ÄôńĪn muhtemel saldńĪrńĪsńĪna karŇüńĪ nasńĪl √∂nlem alacak? Osman Bey‚Äôin Mońüollarla yaptńĪńüńĪ anlaŇümanńĪn bozulmasńĪnńĪ Nikola nasńĪl deńüerlendirecek? Osman Bey, Malhun Hatun‚Äôla evlenme kararńĪnńĪ yeniden deńüerlendirecek mi? Umur Bey yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ baŇüarńĪsńĪzlńĪńüńĪn ardńĪndan kendini affettirmek i√ßin ne yapacak?

KaranlńĪńüńĪn i√ßinde ona yol g√∂steren ‚ÄúaŇük‚ÄĚ oldu‚Ä¶

Kan ve g√∂zyaŇüńĪyla sulanan topraklarda, g√∂k ekini gibi bi√ßilen; yedi g√∂ńü√ľ, yedi yeri, dańülarńĪ, denizleri aŇüacak bir milletin r√ľyasńĪnńĪ ‚ÄúaŇükla‚ÄĚ g√∂rd√ľ.

G√ľc√ľn√ľ kńĪlńĪcńĪndan deńüil, ‚ÄúaŇüktan‚ÄĚ aldńĪ‚Ä¶ ZorbalńĪńüa adaletle; k√∂lelińüe h√ľrriyetle direnen, tarihin g√∂rd√ľńü√ľ en b√ľy√ľk imparatorluńüa adńĪnńĪ ‚ÄúaŇükla‚ÄĚ verdi.

72 milleti kńĪran bozuk d√ľzene karŇüńĪ baŇükaldńĪrńĪ, mazlumlarńĪn sessiz √ßńĪńülńĪńüńĪna umut, KuruluŇü‚Äôun adńĪ oldu‚Ä¶

KuruluŇü Osman‚Ä¶ 400 √ßadńĪrlńĪk bir obadan, ‚Äúilahi aŇükla‚ÄĚ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluńüuna y√ľr√ľy√ľŇü√ľn hikayesi.

snippet.title: Eurovision 2021: Semi-Final 2 Jury Show Livestream
snippet.description:
We are in the press centre at Ahoy. We will be livestreaming the Semi-Final 2 Jury Show this evening. Tune in to listen to our commentary on the Jury Show before you watch the performances tomorrow evening. The 17 countries in tonight's line-up:  San Marino, Estonia, Czech Republic, Greece, Austria, Poland,  Moldova, Iceland, Serbia, Georgia, Albania, Portugal, Bulgaria, Finland, Latvia, Switzerland, and Denmark.

snippet.title: Radińá: Izrael bi napravio kljuńćnu greŇ°ku kada bi uŇ°ao u Gazu
snippet.description:
Izraelska vojska i jutros je nastavila bombardiranje Pojasa Gaze.

Od ponedjeljka, kada su pońćeli napadi, ubijeno je 53 Palestinaca, meńĎu njima 14 djece. ViŇ°e od 300 je povrijeńĎenih. Stanovnici Gaze evakuirani su iz svojih domova. Izrael tvrdi da su mete bili Hamas i njegovo vojno krilo. Hamas je saopńáio da su u izraelskim raketnim napadima uniŇ°tene sve policijske stanice na obalnom podruńćju. Rijeńć je o najintenzivnijim napadima od bombardiranja 2014.

Gost Vijesti je Aleksandar Radińá, vojni analitińćar.

#Gaza #Palestina #Izrael

snippet.title: The NBA Arrives In Fortnite
snippet.description:
Lace up... The Crossover is going to knock you off your feet. https://fn.gg/NBA

For the first time ever, the NBA is joining Fortnite! Coinciding with the debut of the State Farm NBA Play-In Tournament, Fortnite x NBA: The Crossover brings basketball‚Äôs best into the Item Shop and Fortnite Creative, and with Team Battles, a unique experience featuring all 30 NBA teams in Fortnite.

Debuting on May 21 at 8pm ET, players can suit up and rep any of the league's 30 teams. The In The Paint Set includes 31 uniforms, including all 30 NBA teams. 

Also available, grab the Shoot & Score Pack to get the Hookshot Emote and Mini Hoop Back Bling, which can feature the logo of all 30 NBA teams. When other players have the Mini Hoop Back Bling equipped, you‚Äôll be able to call your shot! 

If you‚Äôre more of a point guard, show off your handles with the Dribblin' traversal Emote.

#FortniteNBA #TheCrossover #FortniteNBATheCrossover

de.title: Mit einem Baggerschaufel z√ľndet Aldin meisterhaft ein Feuerzeug an - 4K
de.description: Aldin ńĆajlakovińá, ein junger Baggerfahrer, hat ein au√üergew√∂hnliches Gef√ľhl f√ľr die Arbeit mit einer Maschine mit einem Gewicht von 30 Tonnen. Deshalb z√ľndet er ohne Probleme ein Feuerzeug mit einem Eimer an, der eine Tonne wiegt. Sein n√§chstes Ziel ist es, zwei Feuerzeuge gleichzeitig zu laden und mit Hilfe eines L√∂ffels einen Nagel in das Brett zu schlagen, ohne ihn zu verzerren. Schauen Sie sich im Video an, wie es heute auf einer Baustelle in Zenica aussah.

en.title: With an excavator bucket, Aldin masterfully lights a lighter - 4K
en.description: Aldin ńĆajlakovińá, a young excavator operator, has an extraordinary feeling for working with a machine weighing 30 tons, so he lights a lighter without any problems with a bucket that weighs one ton. His next goal is to load two lighters at the same time and drive a nail into the board with the help of a spoon without distorting it. Take a look at what it looked like today at a work site in Zenica in the video.
